examples: They remain resolutely opposed to the idea.
He resolutely refused to speak English unless forced to.
"Nobody believes you about that any more, and I won't either," Heidi said resolutely.
Today, Orszag contacted me and resolutely claims I was wrong in my reporting.
Every year since then, the "Keeling Curve", as it has become known, has squiggled resolutely higher.
